ext_description.message: Detect and prevent sensitive data from being sent to external AI tools

connect_standalone_hint.message: Not required in standalone mode — the extension works without a dashboard.

prompts_empty_line2.message: Click New to create your first prompt.

category_email_risk.message: Email addresses are personal data under GDPR Art. 4 and must not be transmitted to external AI services without a legal basis.

category_email_action.message: Replace the address with a neutral phrase such as 'the user concerned' or 'colleague XY' — no real mail address.

category_phone_risk.message: Phone numbers allow direct identification of individuals and are subject to data protection rules.

category_phone_action.message: Remove the number or replace it with '[phone number]'. Describe the matter without a concrete sequence of digits.

category_iban_risk.message: IBAN numbers are highly sensitive banking data. Unauthorised disclosure can have civil and criminal consequences.

category_iban_action.message: Remove the IBAN completely. Use 'the account of the person concerned' without any account number instead.

category_credit_card_risk.message: Credit card data is subject to PCI-DSS compliance obligations. Transmitting it to external services is prohibited.

category_credit_card_action.message: Remove the card number. Describe the issue with 'the payment method' without any concrete digits.

category_address_risk.message: Postal addresses allow physical localisation of individuals and are protected data under GDPR.

category_address_action.message: Replace the address with 'customer address' or 'shipping address' — without street, ZIP, or city.

category_customer_id_risk.message: Customer and order numbers can be used to identify individuals or link data sets.

category_customer_id_action.message: Pseudonymise the ID (e.g. 'customer A', 'order #XYZ') or describe the case without a real reference number.

category_employee_id_risk.message: Employee numbers are internal identifiers and must not be shared with external services.

category_employee_id_action.message: Replace the number with a role description such as 'the employee concerned' or 'colleague from team X'.

category_secret_risk.message: API keys, passwords, and tokens grant access to systems. A compromise can lead to serious security incidents.

category_secret_action.message: Remove the secret immediately and rotate it in your system. Describe the issue without any concrete credentials.

category_hr_data_risk.message: Salary data, social security numbers, and other HR information are particularly sensitive data under GDPR Art. 9.

category_hr_data_action.message: Replace concrete HR data with generic descriptions ('salary range', 'person concerned') without real values.

category_custom_keyword_risk.message: This term has been classified as confidential by your organisation's compliance policies.

category_custom_keyword_action.message: Remove or rephrase the flagged term in line with your internal communication policies.

overlay_default_block_message.message: This message contains restricted data and cannot be sent under your organisation's compliance policies.

overlay_default_warn_message.message: Your message contains potentially sensitive information. Please review it carefully before continuing.

overlay_redact_hint.message: Sensitive parts have been replaced with placeholders. You can still adjust the text before sending.
